working_on: Dependency version-control mechanism: boot-time version telemetry + Dependabot PR surface + validator soft-warn; then clear 11 existing Dependabot PRs as first exercise.
outcome_summary: Phase A: shipped ADR 0080 (engine) — boot-time dependency version visibility mechanism. New tools probe_versions.py (one-line python+chromadb+mempalace+venv-classification surface) and scan_dependabot_prs.py (sibling to scan_issue_backlog.py; quiet/FYI/LOUD modes by count + age) wired into session-start.sh. New validate.dependabot_pr_stale soft-warn (health_probe phase per ADR 0063; per-PR fire ≥7d). 42 new pytests green. ADR 0069 empirical record updated declaratively per ADR 0062; dependency-discipline.md + tools-validate-interpretation.md + first-exercise readiness note authored. Phase B: all 11 backlogged Dependabot PRs (#94–#105) merged sequentially as the new mechanism's first natural exercise — per-PR procedure (gh pr checkout → rebase origin/main → uv lock → commit --amend → push --force-with-lease → CI green → squash-merge). 10 of 11 were floor-aligns-to-current (installed transitive predated the new floors); reportlab was the lone material update (4.5.0→4.5.1). CI green on every PR. Final validate.py: 0 hard-fails; baseline soft-warns only (edge_evidence_empty 46, missing_rigor_score 360, issue_collision 14, orphan_leaf 1, mempalace_wing_count_growth 1, timestamp_helper_bypass 2); dependabot_pr_stale: 0 (correct — all 11 PRs were 1 day old below threshold). Two visibility gaps from S-0144→S-0146 MemPalace arc closed mechanically. Auto-mode classifier correctly blocked a proposed consolidated-commit shortcut that would have bypassed ADR 0069's user-merges posture; resulting per-PR flow matched the approved plan. T1-A/T1-B/T1-C closed in-session.
declared_scope: Ship boot-time dependency version visibility mechanism (probe_versions.py + scan_dependabot_prs.py + validate.dependabot_pr_stale + ADR 0080 + dependency-discipline.md + first-exercise readiness note) as Phase A. Then exercise mechanism via Phase B: clear 11 backlogged Dependabot PRs end-to-end per-PR procedure.
